info.name: Build Mart API Collection
info.description: Collection for the Laravel API: auth (customer + admin), payments, appointments, storefront resources, products, categories, careers upload, settings singleton, leads, hero/deals config, careers/testimonials page singletons, testimonials CRUD, and wishlist.

item.name: Admin Authentication
item.description: Admin-scoped Sanctum auth backed by the admins table. Login returns { token, admin }; store the token in the adminToken variable. Logout revokes it.

item.name: Settings
item.description: Singleton with four sections: store, notifications, seo, social. PATCH /settings/{section} shallow-merges into one section and returns the whole object.

item.name: Leads
item.description: Contact-form and newsletter capture. /leads/contact sets type=contact,status=new; /leads/newsletter sets type=newsletter,status=subscribed. Generic /leads supports ?type= filter.

item.name: Hero & Deals Config
item.description: Singletons served as objects on mock-style (/heroConfig, /dealsConfig), storefront (/hero/config, /deals/config) and admin (/admin/hero/config, /admin/deals/config) paths. Hero slides + galleries are also persisted relationally.

item.name: Content Pages
item.description: Landing-page content singletons. Section updates merge without clobbering untouched sections.

item.name: Testimonials

item.description: Full record CRUD in camelCase on /testimonials (public) and /admin/testimonials. Bulk applies one patch to many ids; reorder rewrites sortOrder 1..n from the posted id order.

item.name: Wishlist
item.description: Per-user wishlist storing a flat product snapshot; reads return the nested product. camelCase keys are normalised to snake_case on write.

formdata.description: Upload a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file
